# Gaia Skill Tree
> An evidence-backed public registry of AI agent capabilities.

## Registry
- Graph: https://gaiaskilltree.com/graph/gaia.json
- Named entries: https://gaiaskilltree.com/named/
- Badges: https://gaiaskilltree.com/badges/
- Trust Ledger: https://gaiaskilltree.com/trust/ledger/

## Documentation
- English docs: https://gaiaskilltree.com/en/
- Codex: https://gaiaskilltree.com/codex.html
